info.name: Microsoft Azure NetworkCloud
info.description: The Network Cloud APIs provide management of the on-premises clusters and their resources, such as, racks, bare metal hosts, virtual machines, workload networks and more.

item.name: providers

request.description: Get a list of all available resource provider operations. It contains a URL link to get the next set of results.

response.name: OK

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
